actions.action: command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Install gitleaks and make it available on PATH before running repository hooks.'; exit 1; }; gitleaks protect --staged --redact
command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Install gitleaks and make it available on PATH before running repository hooks.'; exit 1; }; gitleaks detect --redact
